title: Mocoosy 24pcs Slow Rising Squishy Toys Party Bag Fillers for Kids Party Favours, Fidget Squeeze Toy Animal Toys Stress Ball for Kid Birthday Goodie Fillers,Pinata Stuffers,Classroom Prizes Kids Gifts
features: 【Child Safety and Durable】: Our animal squishy party favours are made from safe, durable materials to withstand long hours of squeezing, bringing endless joy to toddlers and children. Kids can play with confidence and have no worries!

【Perfect Easter Basket Stuffers】: This party favor set includes 24 pcs different designs cute animal squishy toys prefilled in capsules, making it the perfect addition to Easter baskets. Kids will enjoy the surprise of finding these squeezable toys during Easter egg hunts! Each animal squeeze toy comes in a ball container and includes 24 small chains, making them perfect for attaching to backpacks or keychains as decorative accessories.

【Stress Relief & Motor Skills Boost】: Research shows that squishy toys can help kids relieve anxiety. Squeezing them not only relaxes their minds but also improves fine motor skills. Kids will love playing with these stress-relieving toys and feel the stress fade away!

【Great for Any Occasion】: These washable novelty toys are perfect as birthday goodie bag fillers, birthday party favors, prefilled party bag fillers, treasure box toys, pinata toys, classroom rewards, carnival claw machine prizes, and more. A thoughtful gift idea for birthdays, Thanksgiving, Christmas or special celebrations.

【Amusing Party Favor for Kids】: Planning a birthday party? These prefilled animal squishies playsets are a great choice for party favors. Both boys and girls will love these fun, cute squishy that can be kept in a treasure box or exchanged as classroom prizes!
description: Product Description Super Value Toys for Party Favors Our prefilled party favors set includes 24 pcs of adorable and realistic slow-rising animal squishies toys with different designs, perfect as unique rewards for kids, or party favors for any occasion. These squeeze toys are perfectly sized, soft to the touch, and made of safe and durable materials, ensuring your kids play with peace of mind and have fun without worries. Treasure Box Prizes For parents and teachers, this squishies playset is a good choice, which can save time and energy in selecting toys or prizes. It is excellent supplement to parent-child activities, and perfect classroom prizes that encourage students to participate in classroom activities. Endless Fun With Cute Toys Share these mini cute toys with others, help kids make new friends, enhance interactivity, and discover more interesting things. Providing endless fun and entertainment for them! Stress Relief Toys Pinch, squeeze, grab these squishies to reduce stress and anxiety, they will return to their original shape no matter how hard they are squeezed. Soft stress relief toys provide a unique sensory experience for kids! Perfect Party Favors Prefilled squish toys are the best party favors and gifts for kids. Great gift giving and party needs for birthday gifts, party favors, goodie bags fillers, mini paw machines, Egg hunt event and more, have fun with these little toys! Cute Squishies Animal Toys The mini capsule toys with keyhole and keychain are lightweight and easy to carry. With 24 animal patterns to choose from and replace, it's a beautiful decoration for school bags, pencil cases, keychains, and more.
